heading: Management of flood risk reduction projects
label: 701b–16 Management of flood risk reduction projects
notes: “Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 113–121section 2201 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If 2 or more flood control projects are located within the same geographic area, the Secretary shall, at the request of the non-Federal interests for the affected projects, consider those projects as a single program for budgetary or project management purposes, if the Secretary determines that doing so would not be incompatible with the authorized project purposes.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: If any work on a project to which subsection (a) applies is required solely because of impacts to that project from a navigation project, the cost of carrying out that work shall be shared in accordance with the cost-sharing requirements for the navigation project.

children.heading: Use of amounts
children.label: 2 Use of amounts
children.text: Work described in paragraph (1) may be carried out using amounts made available under subsection (a).
